## Purpose

Describe the learner or engineering problem addressed.

## Changes

Summarize the focused changes.

## Evidence

List authoritative sources and checks performed.

## Rights Checklist

- [ ] The contribution is original or properly licensed.
- [ ] No private, proprietary, or paid course material was copied.
- [ ] Third-party names and sources are attributed.

## Quality Checklist

- [ ] The language is concise and accessible.
- [ ] Technical claims distinguish evidence from inference.
- [ ] The change makes no unsupported medical or cognitive-performance claim.
- [ ] Links and Markdown rendering were checked.
